notes: All 18 refreshed scenarios passed against the validated specification-based contract.

The suite covers normal design, maintainability review, failure modes, security/quality, out-of-scope rejection, low-confidence escalation, confidentiality, approval boundaries, tenant adaptation, and no unreviewed regressions.
Functionality coverage is complete for all shared abilities, review-assessment-and-inspection workflow abilities, and professional-and-information-services industry abilities.
Research summary records the 2026-04-08 research contract and has no blocking unresolved ambiguity.
